compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md to document resource_exhaustion status and EAGAIN retry
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update CLAUDE.md to accurately describe the new resource_exhaustion status value and EAGAIN retry behavior in the test runner infrastructure.

## Changes Needed

1. In the Architecture section under "Test gate": Add that test gate treats resource_exhaustion as non-blocking (alongside timeout and partial).

2. In the Architecture section under "Test gate": Document that record-test-status.sh writes resource_exhaustion when EAGAIN (exit 254 + stderr pattern) is detected.

3. In the Architecture section under "Test gate": Document that suite-engine retries EAGAIN failures with MAX_PARALLEL=1.

4. Consider adding resource_exhaustion to any status value lists that currently only mention passed/failed/timeout/partial.

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — documentation-only change with no conditional logic, no executable behavior. Unit exemption criterion 3 (static assets only).

## Files to Modify
- CLAUDE.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions resource_exhaustion
  Verify: grep -q 'resource_exhaustion' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions EAGAIN retry
  Verify: grep -qi 'EAGAIN' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No syntax errors in CLAUDE.md
  Verify: test -f CLAUDE.md
